description_long: This is a medium-sized, twin-engine propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a high-mounted tail. The body is primarily white with a red and gold accent on the tail fin, which features a stylized logo. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, each supporting a turboprop engine with visible propellers. The airplane has a tricycle landing gear configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose wheel. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring multiple windows for visibility. The aircraft is designed for passenger transport, as indicated by the row of windows along the fuselage.
description: A white, twin-propeller passenger airplane with red and gold tail accents, low-mounted straight wings, and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the nose, cockpit windows, propellers, and the symmetrical wing layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full fuselage, row of passenger windows, and the red and gold tail fin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, twin engines, and the trailing edge of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the opposite side of the fuselage and tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets; slight dihedral angle present.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear; gear appears fixed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
